title: erigeron indicus
intro: Erigeron indicus, also known as Indian fleabane, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Himalayas and parts of India. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron indicus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic to prevent wound infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural healers.
